meaning: adj.殖民的,殖民地的n.殖民地居民
examples: His guerrillas defeated the colonial army in 1954.
Tunisia achieved independence from French colonial rule in 1956.
Why are you interested in doing something on community planning in colonial times?
There are several dozen colonial houses to choose from, ranging from modest to lavish.
The seaview rooms are the best, although all rooms are decorated in a faux-colonial style.
